title: cotyledon retusa
intro: Cotyledon retusa, also known as the round-leaved stonecrop or round-leaved euphorbia, is a succulent plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Cotyledon retusa is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
